record.field: Industry: Notify contacts for their matches

if record.x_studio_technical_partner : record['x_studio_technical_partner']['street'] = record.x_studio_street record['x_studio_technical_partner']['zip'] = record.x_studio_zip_code record['x_studio_technical_partner']['city'] = record.x_studio_city record['x_studio_technical_partner']['country_id'] = record.x_studio_country.id else: technical_partner = env['res.partner'].create({ 'name': record.name, 'street': record.x_studio_street, 'zip': record.x_studio_zip_code, 'city': record.x_studio_city, 'country_id': record.x_studio_country.id, 'x_studio_technical_partner': True, }) record['x_studio_technical_partner'] = technical_partner.id

if not record.x_studio_appointments: # First create the link link = env['appointment.invite'].create({ 'short_code': datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%M%m%S%d%Y%H"), 'display_name': record.name, }) # Then the appointment (which creates the general-visit...) appointment = env['appointment.type'].create({ 'name': record.name, 'display_name': record.name, 'x_studio_property': record.id, 'appointment_invite_ids': [link.id], 'location_id': record.x_studio_technical_partner.id, 'image_1920': record.image_1920, 'appointment_tz': env.ref('base.user_admin').tz or 'Europe/Brussels' }) # And then delete the general-visit link_to_delete = env['appointment.invite'].search([('short_code','=','general-visits')]) link_to_delete.unlink()

mail_template = env['mail.template'].search([('id','=',42)]) res = mail_template.send_mail(res_id=record.id) if res: record.write({'x_studio_last_notification': datetime.datetime.now()}) # Update contact last notification date
